title: Trial status chip
description: Colour-coded chip for team_trial.status. Never relies on colour alone — always carries a text label + optional icon.

variant.$expr: ({ scheduled: 'info', in_progress: 'warning', completed: 'accent', converted: 'success', rejected: 'danger', no_show: 'neutral', cancelled: 'neutral' })[props.status]

leadingIcon.$expr: props.showIcon ? ({ scheduled: 'calendar', in_progress: 'clock', completed: 'check-circle', converted: 'user-plus', rejected: 'x-circle', no_show: 'user-minus', cancelled: 'no-symbol' })[props.status] : null

children.$expr: ({ scheduled: 'Scheduled', in_progress: 'In progress', completed: 'Completed', converted: 'Converted', rejected: 'Rejected', no_show: 'No-show', cancelled: 'Cancelled' })[props.status]
